common.emptyMessage: No records found at this time.
common.errorMessage: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password: Password must be at least 6 characters

login.title: Travel Photo AI
login.subtitle: Log in to teleport yourself anywhere on earth

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Sign up to unlock travel locations
register.successToast: Account created! Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email below to receive a password reset link
forgotPassword.successToast: Password reset link sent! Please check your email inbox.
forgotPassword.errorToast: Failed to request password reset. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Create New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter your new password below. Ensure it meets the security strength requirements.
resetPassword.successToast: Password updated successfully! Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.errorToast: Failed to update password. Please try again.
resetPassword.sessionErrorToast: No active recovery session found. Please request a new link.

validation.min8: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.lowercase: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.uppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.number: Password must contain at least one number
validation.special: Password must contain at least one special character

studio.title: Travel Studio
studio.subtitle: Select a scenic category below, add a photo, and teletransport yourself anywhere.
studio.error: Could not load travel destination categories.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.emptyCreations: You haven't generated any travel photos yet. Head to the Studio tab to start!
profile.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to end your current authentication session?

generate.addPortraitDesc: Take a picture or upload from gallery. Headshots work best!
generate.pollingSubtitle:
Our AI is placing your face naturally into the scene.
This usually takes 20–40 seconds.
generate.pollingUploadError: Error uploading photo to generation queue.
generate.pollingModelError: AI model was unable to transform your image. Please try again.
generate.resultDemoDesc:
Add a Replicate API key to see your
face placed into this scene by real AI
generate.resultDemoActiveDesc: Your face is shown in a circle overlay. To see yourself placed into the actual scene, add EXPO_PUBLIC_REPLICATE_API_KEY to your .env file and restart.
generate.resultRealAiSuccess: Real AI generation complete! Your face has been placed into the scene by the Replicate face-swap model.
generate.resultSavedDesc:
Your AI travel photo has been saved to device cache:
{localUri}
generate.resultShareErrorDesc: Sharing is not supported on this platform.

settings.title: Preferences
settings.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete your authentication profile and delete all generated location templates history. This action is irreversible.
settings.deleteSuccessToast: Your account has been deleted successfully.
settings.accountDeletedDesc: Your profile and data have been wiped from our servers.
settings.legalMockAlert: This is a mockup placeholder for the {title} page.
